title: Pi is INCREDIBLE - Building a Custom Coding Agent Live
summary: Pi is a minimalist coding agent framework with a tiny core of read, write, edit, and bash capabilities, with everything else as installable extensions. It supports any model including Kimi K2.6, MiniMax M2.7, and Qwen 3.6, enabling cost-effective alternatives to frontier models with strict rate limits.
